description: After cross-specimen convergence observations — governed cognition patterns compared across two specimens

key_convergences: Non-automatable boundary holds across specimen types
Weak claims remain rejected or limited
Full cognitive auditability from artifacts alone
S2 = lifecycle completion, not semantic perfection
key_divergences: Evidence channels (code graph vs HTML documents)
Enrichment mechanisms (AST edges vs name matching)
Qualification corridor (full evolution vs post-genesis replay)

scope_boundary: Cross-specimen comparison between full governed semantic evolution (NetBox) and post-genesis governed semantic replay (BlueEdge). BlueEdge does NOT prove raw intake genesis. Observations are DESCRIPTIVE (2 specimens = comparison, not pattern).
